description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a matte black finish and metallic silver top, designed to hold a carbonated beverage. The front features a bold, gold sunburst graphic above elegant serif text, with additional gold and white accents. The can's sides display detailed product information, including nutritional facts, ingredients, and multilingual text, all printed in white and gold. The back includes a barcode, recycling symbols, and a color-coded nutritional chart. The top is sealed with a standard pull tab, and the overall design is sleek and modern, with a premium feel. The can's surface appears smooth and hard, with no visible condensation or damage.
description: A tall, matte black aluminum can with gold and white graphics, detailed labeling, and a silver pull tab top. The design is sleek, modern, and premium.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main gold sunburst graphic and prominent product name, with a clean, uncluttered look.
description_view_1: This side view displays detailed product information, including ingredients and multilingual text, as well as recycling and website icons.
description_view_2: This view highlights the nutritional facts table, a color-coded chart, and additional product details in multiple languages.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a barcode, more multilingual text, and the edge of the nutritional chart, with less branding visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a matte black background with a gold sunburst graphic, clean serif typography, and white and gold accent text. The overall style is modern and premium, with detailed product information and minimalistic iconography.
